name: @ts-fix/rules-generics-effect
description: Effect-native rewrite of ts-fix's `generics` rule category (4 SYN + 1 TYP): generic-name-convention, generic-param-count-budget (RULE-007, >4 exclusive), no-generic-with-default-any, no-unnecessary-type-constraint, and prefer-generic-over-any-passthrough (TYP, uses ctx.checker). Pure AST/type-aware predicates on the @ts-fix/rules-core-effect substrate (defineRule/runRule/runTypeAwareRule), consuming the canonical Diagnostic/RuleMeta from @ts-fix/contracts-effect. Plain-TS visitors over the TS compiler API — NOT Effect-wrapped (sync AST walk).
